pre_game.message: Hey H, I'm B – nice to meet you. I'm here because my three-year-old daughter needs surgery, and I'm hoping to win enough to cover the costs. What's your reason for joining this game?

Hey B, nice to meet you too—I'm really sorry about your daughter, that sounds heartbreaking, and I hope you get the money for her surgery. I'm in this to cover a loan I've got coming up next month, so winning would help me and my loved ones a ton; what's your daughter's name, by the way?
Thanks, H, that means a lot—her name's Emma, she's my little fighter. Sorry about your loan; sounds stressful—what's it for, if you're okay sharing?
Oh, that's sweet—Emma sounds like a tough kid. The loan's for some family expenses and bills that piled up, nothing too exciting; how's she holding up with all that?
Thanks, H, yeah, Emma's been a real trooper through it all, but it's hard seeing her in pain sometimes—we're taking it one day at a time. How are you holding up with your family expenses?
Thanks for asking, B—it's been pretty stressful juggling the family bills, but I'm managing okay and staying hopeful about winning here; how are you and Emma getting through each day?
Thanks, H, we're taking it day by day with lots of family support and trying to keep Emma smiling through playtime—it's tough, but it helps; what's your strategy for this game to stay hopeful?
Thanks, B, that's really touching how you're keeping Emma's spirits up; my strategy is just staying positive, focused on winning for my loan, and reminding myself why I'm here—what about you?
Thanks, H, that's kind of you to say—my strategy is pretty similar, just focusing on staying calm, remembering why I'm here for Emma, and hoping that positivity rubs off in the game.
Yeah, staying calm and focused is definitely the way to go—best of luck to you and little Emma, B, I hope we both win big here.
Thanks so much, H, that's really kind—best of luck to you with your loan, I hope we both come out on top.
